title: Resolve all RiskTree and compiler-IR spec findings
description: Apply the consolidated nine-skill review findings to the RiskTree and compiler-IR OpenSpec changes and authoritative tray-jl-ears-spec.md, including algebra, identity/versioning, transactions, approximation, finite-change semantics, traceability, and lifecycle corrections.
acceptance_criteria: All confirmed findings are addressed; source and deltas agree; both OpenSpec changes pass strict validation; focused specialist convergence review reports no approval blockers.
close_reason: Resolved all confirmed RiskTree and compiler-IR specification findings; synchronized the authoritative EARS source; strict OpenSpec, traceability, typo, and whitespace checks pass. ah reports only expected no-toml implementation-contract gaps for proposed scenarios.

title: Multi-skill evaluation of RiskTree specifications
description: Run independent specialist evaluations of add-risk-tree-capabilities using selected specification, testability, edge-case, formal methods, invalid-state, composability, error-handling, optionality, and verification skills; then deduplicate and prioritize results.
acceptance_criteria: One subagent evaluates the specs per selected skill; findings are consolidated with duplicates removed, confidence and severity calibrated, and a final readiness assessment reported.
notes: Scope expanded by user to include add-compiler-ir-incrementalization and tray-jl-ears-spec.md in the same nine-skill evaluation and final synthesis.
close_reason: Completed nine-skill parallel evaluations for RiskTree and compiler-IR specifications, cross-validated findings, and consolidated readiness results.

title: Rule-of-5 review RiskTree specifications
description: Perform all five universal editorial review stages on add-risk-tree-capabilities against risk-tree-ears-spec.md, fix every confirmed finding, and revalidate traceability and OpenSpec structure.
acceptance_criteria: All five review stages completed; confirmed findings fixed; REQ-1 through REQ-44 remain traceable; strict OpenSpec validation passes.
close_reason: Completed all five Rule-of-5 review stages, fixed confirmed findings, reached convergence, and revalidated all 44 requirements.

title: Specify RiskTree capabilities from EARS requirements
description: Translate risk-tree-ears-spec.md into a validated OpenSpec change with traceable capabilities, implementation tasks, and architectural decisions.
acceptance_criteria: OpenSpec change captures REQ-1 through REQ-44, preserves stable IDs, and passes openspec validate --strict.
close_reason: Created and strictly validated OpenSpec proposal covering REQ-1 through REQ-44.
